title: aletes tenuifolia
intro: Aletes tenuifolia, also known as mountain angelica or mountain angelica root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to North America. The plant's roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aletes tenuifolia include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Aletes tenuifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or root extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
